hotkey-show-recipes: Pico Recipes: Show recipes for hovered item
hotkey-show-usages: Pico Recipes: Show usages of hovered item
hover-hint: Left / R: recipes   ·   Right / U: usages
more-recipes: ...and {0} more. Refine via search or drill down through an intermediate item.
no-recipes-found: No recipes found for this item.
no-usages-found: No known usages for this item.
cheat-not-creative: You must be in creative mode to spawn items.
cheat-no-server: Item spawning unavailable: Pico Recipes is not installed on the server.
